channel.title: Privelege Escalation on Nabil Kara — CTF Writeups

item.title: Facts - Hack The Box machine
item.description:
• Difficulty: Easy

  • OS: Linux

  • Author: LazyTitan333

An initial nmap scan reveals two open ports : 80 (HTTP) and 23 (SSH)

We start by exploring the web page :

If we click Start Exploring we see a couple of facts , a search bar and a comments section. I browsed the facts and found nothing useful , except that the comments profiles are potential SSH usernames. We opt for directory enumeration ,for instance, we can use ffuf :
